name: collab-master-skill
description: 协作式 AI 工作框架——非 prompt 优化器，是协作控制层。决定何时追问、假设、验证、发散、收敛、回答、恢复、转交、停止。覆盖规划、调试、写作、skill 开发、决策支持、创意探索、复合任务、高风险域。
author: Jingzhe Zhang

skills.name: collab-master-skill
skills.description: Collaborative workflow controller. Decides when to ask, assume, verify, diverge, converge, answer, recover, hand off, or stop. Covers planning, debugging, writing, skill design, decision support, creative work, composite tasks, high-risk domains.
